name: penelope
description: Penelope — cyber personal AI assistant with a 3D particle face
author: Papi

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Penelope listens for your wake words and conversations.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Penelope uses your camera for face recognition so she only responds to you.
extendInfo.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Penelope transcribes your voice locally via Whisper.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Penelope reads your Apple Calendar to brief you on the day and writes your O-I Kalama shifts.
extendInfo.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Penelope reads and creates Apple Reminders for you.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Penelope controls Spotify, Apple Mail, and other Mac apps via AppleScript.
extendInfo.NSContactsUsageDescription: Penelope reads contacts for iMessage and phone-call routing.
